name: Venty Stainless Steel Cooling Unit
summary: Expertly designed stainless steel cooling unit for the Venty vaporiser by Storz & Bickel.
description: Expertly designed stainless steel cooling unit for the Venty vaporiser by Storz & Bickel. Boasting a weightier build and increased thermal mass, the unit requires a longer heat-up time compared to plastic models, allowing for extended uninterrupted sessions. Designed for use specifically with the Venty Vaporiser. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
